definitions.text: Crowded with business or activities; having a great deal going on.
examples: Be careful crossing that busy street.

definitions.text: Engaged with or preoccupied by an activity or person.
examples: The director cannot see you now: he's busy.
Her telephone has been busy all day.

definitions.text: Having much work to do; having much to get done.
To make somebody busy or active; to occupy.
examples: On my vacation I'll busy myself with gardening.
The work busied me all afternoon.
